title: Andrew Yang predicts AI could eliminate half of white-collar jobs
summary: Andrew Yang warns AI could cut up to half of white-collar jobs, with ripple effects on service industries. Most Americans expect losses.
author: Justin Boggs

title: Have we entered a new age of AI-enabled scientific discovery?
summary: Some say we’ve entered a new age of AI-enabled scientific discovery. But human insight and creativity still can’t be automated.
author: Kathryn Hulick
